name: adp
description: ADP (Agent Data Protocol) — token-efficient lossless serialization for AI agent communication. Slash commands, subagent, skills, SessionStart hook, and dashboard.

plugins.name: adp
plugins.description: Token-efficient lossless serialization for AI agents. 25-50% token savings vs JSON on structured data, 55-80% on prose. Dynamic LUT, differential encoding, capability negotiation, tokenizer-aware cost estimation, and TPD promotion.
